title: Tefal Jamie Oliver Cook's Direct 28cm Frying Pan, Non-Stick Titanium Coating, Thermo-Signal™ Heat Indicator, Induction Compatible, Oven Safe, 10-Year Guarantee
features: Prepare with flair: In high-quality, mirror-polished stainless steel, these pots and pans are as stylish as they are strong. In fact, the stainless steel is guaranteed for 10 years*, so you know it’s made to last.
Last longer: Frying pans have a non-stick coating reinforced with titanium, making them super-resistant and easier to clean.
Stay safe: Rest assured, the non-stick coating contains no harmful or toxic chemicals. It’s safe, for worry-free cooking.
Be confident: The Thermo-Signal heat indicator on frying pans indicates the ideal temperature to start cooking for flawless results every time. When the hourglass disappears, you’re good to go.
Cook evenly: Extra-thick Thermo-Fusion+ bonded bases of stainless steel and aluminium ensure fast and uniform heat distribution, so all your food cooks efficiently and evenly.
Keep it simple: glass lids with drainage holes allow for easy monitoring and draining, internal marks let you gauge quantities in the pan, and riveted stainless-steel handles ensure a secure grip.
Do it your way: The pans perform brilliantly on any hob (even induction) and are oven-friendly, too. Go from hob to oven without switching cookware. Then pop the lot in the dishwasher§. Job done!

How should Jamie Oliver by Tefal Cook's Direct stainless steel pots and pans be cleaned? To extend the life of your product, Tefal recommends hand washing. Avoid abrasive or aggressive cleaning products or detergents. If you're washing the product in the dishwasher, it is recommended to use gentle detergents. Are the Jamie Oliver by Tefal Cook's Direct stainless steel pots and pans compatible with induction hobs? Yes, they are compatible with all hobs including induction What is the purpose of the Thermo-Signal at the centre of Jamie Oliver by Tefal Cook's Direct stainless steel pans? The frying pans are at the perfect cooking temperature when the hourglass in the Thermo-Signal technology disappears​. What should I do if my Jamie Oliver by Tefal Cook's Direct product is defective? Should there be a fault with your Jamie Oliver by Tefal product, please contact our after-service sales team at Tefal.co.uk
